points.title: Tissamaharama Raja Maha Vihara
points.description: Magnificent 3rd century BCE Buddhist temple featuring one of Sri Lanka's largest dagobas (165m circumference) built by King Kavantissa.

points.title: Tissa Wewa (Ancient Tank)
points.description: Historic 2,000-year-old reservoir covering 500+ hectares, offering boat rides, spectacular sunset views, and exceptional bird watching.

points.title: Bundala National Park
points.description: UNESCO Biosphere Reserve and Ramsar wetland famous for massive flamingo flocks, 197 bird species, and five pristine lagoons.

points.title: Yatala Vehera
points.description: Ancient 3rd century BCE dagoba built by Prince Yatala Tissa, featuring unique granite construction and archaeological significance.

points.title: Sandagiri Seya
points.description: Historical stupa and peaceful meditation center surrounded by forest, offering tranquil spiritual experiences.

points.title: Debarawewa Tank
points.description: Scenic ancient reservoir perfect for bird watching, photography, and observing traditional fishing practices.

points.title: Weerawila Lake
points.description: Large freshwater lake supporting diverse bird life including migratory species, fishing activities, and boat excursions.
